title: Berkshire director flags 'distorted' S&P 500, sees banks as undervalued opportunity - CNBC interview (SP500:)
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Berkshire Hathaway director Chris Davis claims the S&P 500 is distorted with inflated valuations, while financial stocks are undervalued. Davis highlights narro
excerpt: Berkshire Hathaway director Chris Davis claims the S&P 500 is distorted with inflated valuations, while financial stocks are undervalued. Davis highlights narrowing market leadership and suggests banks as a good investment opportunity.

content.introduction: Berkshire Hathaway director Chris Davis claims the S&P 500 is distorted with inflated valuations, while financial stocks are undervalued. Davis highlights narrowing market leadership and suggests banks as a good investment opportunity.
body: # Berkshire Director's Warning: Is the S&P 500 Distorted and Banks the Real Opportunity? - S&P 500's 9% rebound from March lows marks one of its fastest recoveries in 36 years, closing at record highs despite narrowing valuation discounts. - Berkshire Hathaway trades at 41.19% intrinsic discount despite strong long-term returns, with Greg Abel's 13F filing this month likely to reveal strategic portfolio shifts including Kraft HeinzKHC-- and Bank of AmericaBAC--. The S&P 500 just experienced one of its fastest recoveries in decades-rising over 9% this month from late-March lows one of the market's fastest turnarounds in at least 36 years. Scott Rubner of Citadel Securities noted there have been 13 instances since 2020 when the S&P 500 traded below a 20x forward multiple, and the average 30-day return following those moments was 3.5%, with a median of 6.4% when SPX forward P/E falls below 20x, forward returns have been favorable.
Berkshire Hathaway director Chris Davis has warned that the S&P 500's record highs mask a “peculiar distortion” driven by a shrinking group of mega-cap leaders.

[![CNBC](https://static-redesign.cnbcfm.com/dist/d6085c9e81f4d7365c8d.svg)](//www.cnbc.com/). * [Buffett Archive](https://buffett.cnbc.com). ![Join IC](https://static-redesign.cnbcfm.com/dist/93743f20be95b721880f.svg). ![Join Pro](https://static-redesign.cnbcfm.com/dist/69ae09b80acd376e9c97.svg). ![Join IC](https://static-redesign.cnbcfm.com/dist/93743f20be95b721880f.svg). ![Join Pro](https://static-redesign.cnbcfm.com/dist/69ae09b80acd376e9c97.svg).
